abilities.text: Models in this units have an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor's Judgement
abilities.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
abilities.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains and Agathae Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abilities.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Consecrated Ground
abilities.text: When this FORTIFICATION is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1" of another part. Friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this FORTIFICATION. While an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army is within 1" of this FORTIFICATION, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

abilities.name: Holy Cover
abilities.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Defenders of the Faith
abilities.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.text: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: The Emperor's Grace
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Sacred Command
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Null Rod
abilities.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Rod of Office
abilities.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Divine Deliverance
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Sacred Command
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Rites of Castigation
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Virtue of Intolerance
abilities.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets its quarry, that attack has the ^^**[Precision]^^** ability and you can re‑roll the Hit roll. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a ^^**Transport**^^.

abilities.name: Attached Unit

abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a DAEMON unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Holy Judgement

abilities.name: Mysterious Saviours
abilities.text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

Each time such an attack destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, the model's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of a 6.

abilities.name: Sacred Healing

If you wish, you first discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to that unit instead.

abilities.name: Litany of Deeds
abilities.text: Each time you gain a Miracle dice as the result of a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit or model being destroyed, if that unit or model was destroyed within 12" of this model, you can re-roll the result of that Miracle dice before adding it to your Miracle dice pool.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.text:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVITIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

abilities.name: Purge and Cleanse
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
abilities.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

abilities.name: Cherubs
abilities.text: Twice per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: Storm of Retribution
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If such an attack targets an enemy unit that has destroyed one or more ^^**Adepta Sororitas^^** units from your army during the battle, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Healing Tears
abilities.text: While this unit contains a Celestine model, in your Command phase, if this unit is below its Starting Strength, either one destroyed Geminae Superia model or up to D3 other Bodyguard models are returned to this unit.

abilities.name: Lifewards
abilities.text: While this unit contains one or more Geminae Superia models, Celestine has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Miraculous Intervention
abilities.text: The first time this unit’s Celestine model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Self Repair
abilities.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, the Attacks characteristics of all of its weapons are halved, and you can only select one ability when using its Relics of the Matriarchs ability, instead of up to two.

abilities.name: Relics of the Matriarchs
abilities.text: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - The Fiery Heart (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit's Move characteristic and add 1 to the Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Censer of the Sacred Rose (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll all Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Argent Shroud (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Icon of the Valorous Heart (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Petals of the Bloody Rose (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by model in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Solemn Procession
abilities.text: Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.’

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Embodied Prophecy
abilities.text:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:
- Sustained Hits 1
- Lethal Hits


If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 5+.
